verses.text: Hear, ye 'kine of Bashan,' women who oppress the poor; ye shall be taken away 'with hooks.' Pampered cruelty. Those who crush the needy for comfort face shameful captivity.
Hear, ye 'kine of Bashan,' women who oppress the poor; ye shall be taken away 'with hooks.' Pampered cruelty. Those who crush the needy for comfort face shameful captivity.
Hear, ye 'kine of Bashan,' women who oppress the poor; ye shall be taken away 'with hooks.' Pampered cruelty. Those who crush the needy for comfort face shameful captivity.
'Come to Bethel, and transgress'; multiply your offerings, 'for this liketh you.' Worship that pleased themselves, not God. Religion done for self-satisfaction is sin, not service.
'Come to Bethel, and transgress'; multiply your offerings, 'for this liketh you.' Worship that pleased themselves, not God. Religion done for self-satisfaction is sin, not service.
God gave them famine, drought, and want, 'yet have ye not returned unto me.' Chastening unheeded. Repeated discipline was wasted on a stubborn heart.
God gave them famine, drought, and want, 'yet have ye not returned unto me.' Chastening unheeded. Repeated discipline was wasted on a stubborn heart.
God gave them famine, drought, and want, 'yet have ye not returned unto me.' Chastening unheeded. Repeated discipline was wasted on a stubborn heart.
He smote them with blight, pestilence, and overthrow like Sodom, 'yet have ye not returned unto me.' Mercy in the rod. Each judgment was a call to return, and each was ignored.
He smote them with blight, pestilence, and overthrow like Sodom, 'yet have ye not returned unto me.' Mercy in the rod. Each judgment was a call to return, and each was ignored.
He smote them with blight, pestilence, and overthrow like Sodom, 'yet have ye not returned unto me.' Mercy in the rod. Each judgment was a call to return, and each was ignored.
Therefore 'prepare to meet thy God, O Israel'; He forms the mountains, creates the wind — 'The LORD... is his name.' Solemn summons. Since judgment is certain, make ready to face the Almighty.
